mapper.sql: SELECT task_id, task_no, route_id, route_name, plan_date, inspector_id, inspector_name, task_status, start_time, complete_time, abnormal_count, result_data, photo_urls, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dms_inspection_task
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' AND task_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{taskNo}, '%') AND route_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{routeName}, '%') AND task_status = #{taskStatus} AND inspector_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{inspectorName}, '%')
ORDER BY task_id DESC
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_inspection_task SET del_flag = '2' WHERE task_id IN #{taskId}
mapper.select: WHERE del_flag = '0' AND route_id = #{routeId} AND DATE(plan_date) = CURDATE()
WHERE del_flag = '0' AND task_status = '0' AND plan_date < CURDATE()
